about.pageSubtitle: 23 years of excellence in premium cashmere production, born from the green oasis of Ordos.
about.heroDesc1: In the heart of Inner Mongolia, Ordos was once a land battling against sand and wind. Our story doesn't begin in a factory—it begins with the first tree planted in the Kubuqi Desert decades ago by herders determined to reclaim the land.
about.heroDesc2: Through scientific grazing and ecological restoration, the people of Ordos transformed flowing sand back into a thriving oasis. On this reborn land, the world's most precious Albus white cashmere goats now graze. DONGXIAO® CASHMERE was born from this miracle—not just producing cashmere, but continuing the green epic of harmony between humans and nature.
about.journeyFoundedDesc: DONGXIAO CASHMERE established in Ordos, Inner Mongolia
about.journeyGlobalDesc: Expanded to 50+ countries across Europe, America, and Asia

products.haveQuestionsDesc: Can't find what you're looking for? Submit a custom inquiry and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our products, services, certifications, and ordering process.

cta.title: Didn't find your answer?
cta.description: Our B2B sales team is here to help. Contact us directly for personalized support and inquiries.

moq1.question: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
moq1.answer: Our standard MOQ is 100 pieces per design. For established clients with large order histories, we can negotiate lower MOQs. We understand that new brands need flexibility, so we work with you to find solutions that fit your business model.

moq2.question: Do you offer free samples?
moq2.answer: Yes, we provide free samples for qualified B2B buyers. Simply contact us with your requirements, and we will send samples at no charge. This allows you to verify our quality before committing to a bulk order.

sampling1.question: How long does sampling take?
sampling1.answer: Our standard sampling time is 7-10 business days. This includes design confirmation, sample production, and quality inspection. For rush orders, we can expedite to 5-7 days with an additional fee. Once approved, bulk production typically takes 30-45 days depending on order size.

sampling2.question: Can you support custom designs?
sampling2.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in custom design development. Our design team can work with your specifications, including custom colors, patterns, embroidery, and branding. We provide 3D virtual sampling technology to preview designs before production.

quality1.question: What certifications do you have?
quality1.answer: We hold 7 international certifications: ISO 9001 (Quality Management), ISO 14001 (Environmental Management), OHSAS 18001 (Occupational Health & Safety), EnMS (Energy Management), OEKO-TEX® Standard 100 (Textile Safety), BSCI (Business Social Compliance Initiative), and The Good Cashmere Standard by AbTF (animal welfare & sustainability).

quality2.question: How do you ensure cashmere quality?
quality2.answer: We source premium cashmere with average fineness below 15μm and length exceeding 36mm. Every batch undergoes rigorous quality testing including fiber analysis, color fastness, shrinkage, and tensile strength tests. We maintain strict quality control at every production stage and provide third-party certification upon request.

production1.question: What is your annual production capacity?
production1.answer: Our facility produces 1,200+ tons of dehairing cashmere, 1,500+ tons of cashmere yarn, 2+ million cashmere scarves and shawls, 5+ million cashmere knitwear pieces, and 1+ million meters of wool and cashmere fabrics annually. We have the capacity to handle large bulk orders without compromising quality.

production2.question: What product specifications do you offer?
production2.answer: We offer complete gauge specifications from 3GG to 18GG for knitwear. Our products include cashmere sweaters, scarves, shawls, blankets, socks, gloves, knee pads, and home accessories. We work with 100% cashmere, cashmere-wool blends, and other premium fiber combinations.

logistics1.question: What countries do you ship to?
logistics1.answer: We ship to 50+ countries worldwide, including North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, Middle East, and beyond. We work with reliable logistics partners to ensure timely and safe delivery. Shipping costs and methods vary based on order size and destination.

logistics2.question: What are the payment terms?
logistics2.answer: We offer flexible payment terms including 30% deposit with order confirmation and 70% balance before shipment. For established clients, we can negotiate terms such as 50/50 split or net 30/60 arrangements. We accept bank transfers, letters of credit (L/C), and other secure payment methods.

sustainability1.question: What is your commitment to sustainability?
sustainability1.answer: Sustainability is core to our operations. We practice ethical cashmere collection with animal welfare standards, implement circular water treatment systems, use plant-based dyes, and maintain transparent supply chain traceability. Each product has a digital "ecological ID card" showing its production journey from pasture to finished product.

communication1.question: How can I contact you for inquiries?
communication1.answer: You can reach us via WhatsApp: +86-156-6185-3999 (preferred for quick communication), Email: dongxiaocashmere@erdosdx.com, or use our online inquiry form. Our B2B sales team typically responds within 24 hours. We also maintain active profiles on LinkedIn and Instagram for industry updates.

production.pageSubtitle: From premium Inner Mongolian cashmere to finished luxury products. Discover how we maintain excellence at every stage.
production.introDescription: Our production process combines traditional cashmere craftsmanship with modern manufacturing technology. Every step is carefully controlled to ensure the highest quality standards and customer satisfaction.

step1.title: Cashmere Collection
step1.description: Premium cashmere sourcing from Inner Mongolia
details: Sourced from Inner Mongolia, the world's cashmere capital
Only the finest grade cashmere fibers are selected
Strict quality control during collection process
Direct partnerships with local herders ensure authenticity
Traceability from source to production facility

step2.title: Fiber Cleaning & Sorting
details: Advanced cleaning technology removes dirt and debris
Fibers are sorted by length, color, and quality grade

step3.title: Carding & Combing
details: Fibers are carded to align and remove tangles
Fine combing ensures uniform fiber distribution
Preparation of fiber bundles for spinning
Modern equipment ensures precision and efficiency

step4.title: Spinning
details: Precise tension control for consistent yarn quality
Color options: natural, dyed, or custom colors
Yarn testing for strength and durability

step5.title: Knitting
details: Advanced knitting machines for various products
Sweaters, scarves, hats, socks, and accessories
Precise pattern control for consistent sizing

step6.title: Washing & Finishing
details: Gentle washing process preserves fiber quality

fiberGrade.description: Only the finest cashmere fibers used

brandStory.heroSubtitle: The Warmth and Vision of DongXiao Cashmere
brandStory.heroDesc: From the first saulex in the Kubuqi Desert to the shining pearl of the Cashmere Capital. DongXiao Cashmere is not just a product—it's a promise from the Ordos oasis. Warm your skin, protect our planet.

1.title: Origins: From Desert to Green Oasis
content: In the heart of Inner Mongolia, Ordos was once a land battling wind and sand. Our story doesn't begin in a workshop—it begins with the first saulex planted in the Kubuqi Desert decades ago by herders.

Through scientific grazing and ecological restoration, Ordos transformed shifting sands back into thriving grassland where the world's most precious Albus white cashmere goats now graze. DongXiao Cashmere was born in this oasis of warmth—continuing the green epic of harmony between humans and nature.
DongXiao Cashmere (DongXiao) was born in the heart of this 'Warm City'—we're not just producing cashmere, but continuing the green epic of 'harmonious coexistence between humans and nature'.
1.visualText: From desert to green, from wasteland to oasis

2.title: Craftsmanship: 23 Years Defining Cashmere Excellence
content: Since our founding in 2002, DongXiao has spent 23 years deepening our expertise in the cashmere industry. We've witnessed Ordos's magnificent transformation from 'raw material base' to 'World Cashmere Capital'. As a pioneer in integrated manufacturing and trade, DongXiao represents the pinnacle of Chinese manufacturing.
Scale & Precision: We produce 1,200 tons of dehired cashmere and 1,500 tons of cashmere yarn annually, with full-specification knitting technology ranging from 3GG to 18GG.

Complete Coverage: From classic cashmere sweaters and scarves to high-quality shawls, blankets, and home accessories, DongXiao meets the diverse customization needs of global buyers through our dual strengths in weaving and knitting.
Premium Partnerships: Our quality has earned long-term recognition from international first-tier brands including VC, CC, AB, BB, with products reaching Europe, America, Japan, and Korea.
2.visualText: 23 years of dedication, defining industry standards

3.title: Responsibility: Seven Certifications, One ESG Commitment
content: At DongXiao, we believe 'luxury' must be sustainable. We're one of the few companies in the industry to simultaneously hold seven international authoritative certifications.
Environment & Energy (ISO 14001, EnMS): Our factory operates under an efficient energy management system.
Social Responsibility (BSCI, OHSAS 18001): We ensure every worker is treated with respect and works in safe, dignified conditions.

Sustainability Standards (GCS by AbTF, OEKO-TEX®): We're deeply committed to the 'Good Cashmere Standard' (The Good Cashmere Standard), ensuring every step from pasture to finished garment meets animal welfare standards and is harmless to human health.

4.title: Future: Smart Pastures & Green Responsibility
content: Looking ahead, DongXiao is committed to building a 'Smart Pasture' model. We use digital tools to monitor grassland carrying capacity, supporting Mongolian herders in scientific rotational grazing.
Transparent Supply Chain: In the future, every DongXiao cashmere garment will have an 'Ecological ID Card' — scan it to trace which regenerated grassland it came from.
Zero-Carbon Vision: As Ordos advances toward becoming the 'World Cashmere Capital', DongXiao will continue increasing investment in green technology, circular fibers, and lossless dyeing processes.
We're not just selling a cashmere sweater—we're selling a promise from the Ordos oasis. One that warms your skin and protects our planet.

brandStory.brandMottoQuote: Not just a sweater, but a piece of our land.
brandStory.brandMottoDesc: Every DongXiao Cashmere product carries the story of the Ordos oasis. We promise to provide global customers with products that not only warm skin but also warm hearts through sustainable production methods, transparent supply chains, and deep environmental care.

testimonials.joinPartnersDesc: Experience the DONGXIAO® difference. Connect with our team today to discuss your wholesale cashmere needs.

testimonial1.text: Working with DONGXIAO® has been transformative for our business. Their quality is exceptional, and the flexibility with MOQ allowed us to launch our premium cashmere line without massive upfront investment. The 7-10 day sampling turnaround is incredibly fast.
testimonial1.highlight: Exceptional quality, fast sampling, and flexible MOQ

testimonial2.text: We've been sourcing cashmere from DONGXIAO® for over three years now. Their consistency is remarkable—every batch meets our strict quality standards. The OEKO-TEX® certification gives us confidence when selling to our premium customers.
testimonial2.highlight: Consistent quality, reliable certifications, impressive capacity

testimonial3.text: DONGXIAO® stands out for their transparency and communication. From initial inquiry to final delivery, they keep us informed every step of the way. The quality of their cashmere products is world-class.
testimonial3.highlight: Transparent communication, world-class quality, competitive pricing
